Issues: Low commercial appeal due to basic and unrefined artistic execution.
Print quality is not high; the lines and colors appear simple and lack professional polish required for high-value sales.
Uniqueness is low; the concept of a stylized cat is highly common, making it difficult to stand out in a saturated market.
Technical skill, while present, does not demonstrate the level of skill typically required for commercial illustration.
The composition is simple but lacks dynamic interest or sophisticated design elements.
